holdings.infoBox: USXF is an equity ETF with a total of 293 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.48%, Broadcom at 7.00%, Micron Technology at 4.66%, Advanced Micro Devices at 3.31%, and Visa Inc. at 2.20%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Advanced MSCI USA ETF (USXF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Choice ESG Screened index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US equities screened for positive environmental, social and governance rating while also screening for involvement in controversial activities. USXF was launched on Jun 16, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Choice ESG Screened Index
